lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: Saros Release Date
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: Saros moved from a broad 2026 window to a dated launch plan, then to the final April schedule. This timeline gives a fast, reliable view of each milestone from reveal to full release.

steps.title: February 12, 2025: Saros Announced for 2026
steps.description: Housemarque introduced Saros for PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 5 Pro, with Arjun Devraj and Carcosa presented as the core setup.

steps.title: September 24, 2025: First Dated Saros Release Window
steps.description: The gameplay reveal set an initial March 20, 2026 launch target before the date was later revised in follow-up communication.

steps.title: December 11, 2025: Saros Date Updated to April 30
steps.description: Housemarque confirmed April 30, 2026 as the new release date and opened Saros pre-orders on the same announcement cycle.

steps.title: April 28, 2026: Saros Digital Deluxe Early Access
steps.description: The Saros Digital Deluxe package includes a 48-hour early access window ahead of the standard global launch.

steps.title: April 30, 2026: Saros Full Release
steps.description: The official Saros FAQ and store pages align on April 30, 2026 as the full launch date for the base edition.

quickTips: Track Saros launch updates through PlayStation Blog and official game pages first.
Saros pre-order and early access timing can differ by edition, so check edition details before purchase.
Saros rollout messages are easiest to follow in a timeline format because dates were revised during promotion.
Saros launch-day planning is simpler if you separate early-access timing from standard-edition timing.

lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.title: Saros Trailer
lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.intro: Saros trailer coverage now spans reveal mood, gameplay mechanics, story emphasis, and launch-window messaging. Watching in sequence gives the cleanest picture of how Saros has been presented.

cards.name: Saros Cinematic Announce Trailer
cards.description: The first Saros reveal establishes Arjun Devraj, the eclipse over Carcosa, and the game tone before deep combat footage appears.

cards.name: Saros Gameplay Reveal Trailer
cards.description: This Saros trailer introduces dash mobility, projectile-heavy pressure, Soltari Shield usage, and power-weapon conversion in active encounters.

cards.name: Saros Pre-Order Trailer
cards.description: Released with the date update, this Saros cut adds stronger story framing and cast-focused moments while reinforcing launch messaging.

cards.name: Saros Gameplay Overview Trailer
cards.description: A compact Saros systems recap highlighting progression structure, planet hazards, and key combat hooks from longer demonstrations.

cards.name: Saros Preview Trailer
cards.description: This Saros launch-window promo tightens focus on release momentum, PS5 branding, and edition visibility for new players.

lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.title: Saros Gameplay Overview
lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.intro: Saros gameplay has enough official detail to map the full run loop: loadout setup, aggressive bullet pressure, progression at The Passage, and biome escalation under eclipse conditions.

items.name: Saros Run Setup and Loadout Choice
items.description: Each Saros run starts with weapon and perk decisions across Soltari and alien gear options, shaping your risk profile before combat begins.

items.name: Saros Soltari Shield Conversion Loop
items.description: Saros lets Arjun absorb blue projectiles with the shield, store energy, and convert that pressure into power-weapon burst damage.

items.name: Saros Power Weapon Windows
items.description: Major Saros encounters reward clean timing windows where stored shield energy can flip defensive phases into high-offense moments.

items.name: Saros Passage and Armor Matrix
items.description: The Saros hub supports persistent progression through Armor Matrix upgrades and narrative interactions between high-pressure runs.

items.name: Saros Eclipse Escalation Risk Layer
items.description: Saros eclipse triggers raise danger through corrupted attacks while increasing rewards, creating meaningful run-level decisions.

items.name: Saros Biomes and Boss Phase Design
items.description: Saros previews show distinct biome identities and multi-phase boss pacing built around movement reads, projectile discipline, and adaptation.

lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.title: Saros Story and Setting
lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.intro: Saros worldbuilding centers on Carcosa, a lost colony mystery, and a repeat-death structure tied directly to both narrative delivery and long-term progression.

solutions.name: Saros Core Premise
solutions.description: Saros frames a haunting mission on Carcosa under an eclipse, where rebuilding a future comes with personal and strategic cost.

solutions.name: Saros Protagonist: Arjun Devraj
solutions.description: Arjun Devraj drives the Saros narrative, combining combat expertise with a mission thread that connects survival, discovery, and consequence.

solutions.name: Saros Planet: Carcosa
solutions.description: Carcosa is a shifting alien environment in Saros, defined by ruins, hostile life, legacy systems, and repeated uncertainty between runs.

solutions.name: Saros Hub: The Passage
solutions.description: The Passage in Saros acts as a return point for story beats, crew interactions, and progression planning before the next expedition.

solutions.name: Saros Death-Return Loop
solutions.description: Saros uses resurrection as both a story mechanic and gameplay backbone, making each failure part of broader forward momentum.

solutions.name: Saros Delivery Methods
solutions.description: Saros storytelling blends cinematics, voice-over, logs, NPC dialogue, and environmental clues to reveal context over repeated runs.

managementTips: Read Saros story clues together with gameplay systems, because narrative and progression are designed as one loop.
Use Saros trailer order to understand how tone and plot emphasis evolved before launch.
Track Saros cast reveals alongside story beats to follow character relationships clearly.
Use The Passage scenes in Saros as checkpoints for both lore understanding and upgrade planning.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: Saros Platforms
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: Saros launches on April 30, 2026 as a PlayStation 5 release. Official updates also detail PS5 Pro enhancements, while the FAQ confirms Saros is not available on PlayStation 4.

cards.name: Saros Platform: PlayStation 5
cards.description: Status: Confirmed. Release: April 30, 2026. Official listing presents Saros as a single-player action title launching on PlayStation 5.

cards.name: Saros Platform: PlayStation 5 Pro
cards.description: Status: Enhanced. Release: April 30, 2026. Housemarque details upgraded PSSR, higher base render resolution, evolved 3D audio, adaptive triggers, and stronger haptic feedback.

cards.name: Saros Platform: PlayStation 4
cards.description: Status: Not available. Release: Not announced. The official Saros FAQ states the game is exclusive to PS5 consoles and is not available on PS4.

lucidBlocksWorldRegions.title: Saros PC and Steam Status
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.intro: Current public launch plans for Saros are centered on PlayStation 5. Official materials confirm the PS5 release date, while public PC and Steam launch details are not announced.

regions.name: Saros PC Version Status
regions.description: No PC version is confirmed. Official PlayStation materials currently list Saros only for PlayStation 5 launch plans.

regions.name: Saros Steam Release Date Status
regions.description: No Steam release date is announced. The only confirmed public release date is April 30, 2026 for PlayStation 5.

regions.name: Saros Confirmed Launch Scope
regions.description: Saros launches on PlayStation 5 on April 30, 2026. Official feature updates also describe PS5 Pro enhancements including upgraded PSSR, higher base render resolution, 3D audio, adaptive triggers, and haptics.

regions.name: Saros Official FAQ Platform Scope
regions.description: The Saros FAQ describes the game as a single-player action title, confirms PS5 exclusivity, and states that Saros is not available on PS4.

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.title: Saros Pre-Order and Editions
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: Saros has two digital editions on PlayStation Store. Both include the full game and the same pre-order armor bonus, while Digital Deluxe adds extra armor sets and 48-hour early access.

creatures.name: Saros Standard Edition
creatures.description: Saros Standard Edition includes the full game plus the shared pre-order Hands of Shore Armor bonus.

creatures.name: Saros Digital Deluxe Edition
creatures.description: Saros Digital Deluxe includes the full game, Astra Armor, Onryo Armor, Midgard Armor, 48-hour early access, and the same pre-order Hands of Shore Armor bonus.

creatures.name: Saros Pre-Order Bonus
creatures.description: Any Saros pre-order includes the Hands of Shore Armor bonus, regardless of whether you choose Standard or Digital Deluxe.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: Saros News
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: This Saros timeline highlights major updates in chronological order, from the first reveal to the latest PS5 Pro technical breakdown before launch.

items.name: Saros News | April 16, 2026: PS5 and PS5 Pro Features Detailed
items.description: Housemarque detailed upgraded PSSR, higher base render resolution on PS5 Pro, evolved 3D audio, adaptive trigger behavior, and haptic feedback improvements.

items.name: Saros News | March 26, 2026: Hands-On Report Published
items.description: A three-hour Saros preview covered the first two biomes, Soltari Shield usage, eclipse risk-reward events, and permanent upgrades through the Armor Matrix.

items.name: Saros News | February 12, 2026: Eclipse Escalation Gameplay Revealed
items.description: The update explained The Passage hub, armor customization paths, challenge modifiers, and how eclipse events reshape Saros runs on Carcosa.

items.name: Saros News | December 11, 2025: April 30 Launch Confirmed
items.description: A new trailer confirmed Saros launches on April 30, 2026, opened pre-orders, and expanded the story setup around Arjun Devraj and Carcosa.

items.name: Saros News | September 25, 2025: Extended Gameplay Shared
items.description: Housemarque published a deeper Saros gameplay update and, at that time, announced a March 20, 2026 launch target before the later move to April 30.

items.name: Saros News | February 13, 2025: Saros Officially Announced
items.description: Housemarque introduced Saros as a new IP, confirmed PS5 and PS5 Pro plans, revealed Arjun Devraj, and explained permanent progression after each death.

unlockMilestones: Saros PS5 Pro Technical Update Added

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: Saros Combat Guide
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: Saros rewards players who move into danger instead of always backing away from it. Arjun's combat kit is built around momentum, where the Soltari Shield, Power Weapon, melee pressure, and Eclipse corruption all feed into proactive decision-making.

sections.name: Saros Combat Guide Step 1: Learn the Full Kit
sections.description: Each Saros run starts from a loadout built from Soltari human weapons and Carcosan alien weapons. Standard weapons use primary fire on R2, alt-fire on a half-pull of L2, while Arjun also uses dash, jump, melee, shield, and Power Weapon tools in every fight.

sections.name: Saros Combat Guide Step 2: Use the Soltari Shield Offensively
sections.description: Hold R1 to raise the Soltari Shield as long as enough Shield Power remains. Blue enemy projectiles can be absorbed instead of only avoided, turning incoming bullet patterns into fuel for your next burst.

sections.name: Saros Combat Guide Step 3: Convert Absorbed Shots Into Power Bursts
sections.description: A full pull of L2 activates the Carcosan Power Weapon, and R2 releases stored energy. Official combat footage shows this conversion deleting smaller enemies or groups when used at the right timing window.

sections.name: Saros Combat Guide Step 4: Rotate Dodge, Melee, and Absorb
sections.description: Dash negates most damage while active, melee can break enemy shields, and Saros encounters reward rapid swaps between evasion and pressure. The strongest loop is constant micro-decisions, not one fixed tactic.

sections.name: Saros Combat Guide Step 5: Treat Eclipse Bullets as a Resource
sections.description: During a Saros Eclipse, enemies add yellow corrupted shots. These can still be absorbed, but stored corruption temporarily lowers Arjun's maximum armor until you spend it with a Power Weapon blast.

sections.name: Saros Combat Guide Step 6: Use Controlled Aggression on Bosses
sections.description: Boss encounters like Prophet and Bastion reward shield timing and spacing discipline. Some patterns are safer to outrun, but others are far more profitable when you hold position, absorb orbiting bullets, and avoid the core threat.

lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.title: Saros Progression System
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.intro: Saros is built around coming back stronger after every failure. The major structural shift is permanent progression, where The Passage, the Armor Matrix, retained weapons, and World Dial routing make every run feed your next attempt.

priorities.name: Saros Progression Step 1: Every Death Moves the Build Forward
priorities.description: Saros treats each death as valuable progress. The world changes after failed runs, but Arjun can permanently upgrade his loadout from evolving weapons and suit upgrades so each cycle starts stronger.

priorities.name: Saros Progression Step 2: Return to The Passage Between Cycles
priorities.description: The Passage is the Saros hub between runs, where Arjun meets other Echelon IV survivors, reviews world details, and converts run resources into long-term growth.

priorities.name: Saros Progression Step 3: Build Around the Armor Matrix
priorities.description: Primary lets you reshape Enforcer Armor through the Armor Matrix with upgrades such as higher max armor integrity, faster Lucenite gain, longer shield uptime, Second Chance unlocks, stronger starting stats, and higher base gear levels.

priorities.name: Saros Progression Step 4: Keep Run Resources for Long-Term Growth
priorities.description: Armor Matrix currencies are found in caches and from defeated enemies, then retained when you die and return to The Passage. Even short failed runs can still push your Saros build upward.

priorities.name: Saros Progression Step 5: Use Retained Weapons to Reduce Reset Friction
priorities.description: Once systems open up, collected primary weapons and Power Weapons are retained on death. A weapon that fits your Saros style remains part of your next attempt instead of forcing a full restart.

priorities.name: Saros Progression Step 6: Route Biomes with the World Dial
priorities.description: Unlocked Saros biomes can be reached directly through the World Dial for faster deep attempts, while some Armor Matrix nodes remain gated behind boss clears to keep progression tied to combat execution.

lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.title: Saros Difficulty and Run Length
lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.intro: Saros keeps tense Housemarque action while reducing dead time between meaningful attempts. The core pacing shift is shorter average runs, faster retries, and tunable challenge systems that preserve difficulty without forcing long recovery loops.

groups.name: Saros Run Length and Retry Pace

achievements.title: How long is a normal Saros run?
achievements.description: A normal Saros run is designed to last around 30 minutes, built as repeatable excursions rather than mandatory multi-hour recovery sessions.

achievements.title: Can Saros runs still be longer than that?
achievements.description: Yes. Marathon Saros runs are still possible, and players can chain environments when they want longer sessions. The shorter loop changes the average cadence, not the maximum play length.

achievements.title: Why did Housemarque shorten the Saros loop?
achievements.description: The Saros goal is to preserve danger while removing the helpless feeling of needing several hours to recover progress after a death.

achievements.title: What makes Saros retries less punishing?
achievements.description: Deaths send Arjun back to The Passage for permanent upgrades in the Armor Matrix, and unlocked biomes can be revisited directly through the World Dial.

achievements.title: Does Saros have ways to tune challenge?
achievements.description: Yes. Saros Carcosan Modifiers let you balance Protection Modifiers and Trial Modifiers before runs, including options that reduce damage intake or increase enemy pressure.

achievements.title: Is Saros still a hard game?
achievements.description: Yes. Dense bullets, multiphase bosses, shield timing, and movement precision are still central to Saros. The difference is stronger control over recovery, progression, and challenge balance.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: Saros Eclipse System
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: The Saros Eclipse is not only a visual event. It changes combat rules, enemy patterns, loot value, exploration hazards, and how corruption feeds back into Arjun's power loop across each run.

faqs.question: What triggers a Saros Eclipse?
faqs.answer: Each Saros area contains a multi-armed device that can initiate a biome-specific Eclipse. The first activation demonstrates the system, and later activations become an optional risk-reward decision.

faqs.question: What changes when a Saros Eclipse begins?
faqs.answer: A Saros Eclipse shifts visual and audio presentation while adding biome-specific rule changes. Previewed examples include reactivated machinery hazards and previously safe water becoming dangerous.

faqs.question: How does a Saros Eclipse change enemies and bullets?
faqs.answer: Saros enemy behavior escalates, and yellow corrupted projectile patterns appear. Corrupted shots can reduce maximum armor integrity and force stricter shield timing decisions.

faqs.question: Why trigger a Saros Eclipse on purpose?
faqs.answer: Because Saros reward value rises with danger. Lucenite becomes more valuable during Eclipse states, and corrupted weapons or artifacts can appear with unique properties for that world state.

faqs.question: How does Saros corruption interact with the Power Weapon?
faqs.answer: In Saros, corruption is both threat and resource. Absorbing corrupted shots can feed the Power Weapon, but stored corruption temporarily drains maximum armor until you fire and cleanse it.

faqs.question: Why is the Saros Eclipse system so important?
faqs.answer: The Saros Eclipse links combat, route planning, hazards, loot value, audio, and visible corruption into one unified system instead of separate mechanics.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: Saros Characters and Cast
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: Saros now has a clearly named lead, a returning Housemarque performer, and multiple publicly confirmed supporting cast members tied to Carcosa, The Passage, and Echelon IV.

faqs.question: Who is Arjun Devraj in Saros?
faqs.answer: Arjun Devraj is the Saros protagonist, a Soltari Enforcer investigating the eclipse-struck world of Carcosa. Rahul Kohli performs Arjun as the central point-of-view character.

faqs.question: Who is Sheridan Bouchard in Saros?
faqs.answer: Sheridan Bouchard is the commander of Echelon Four in Saros and is performed by Jane Perry. She is presented as a major authority figure in the mission chain.

faqs.question: Who is Jerome Jackson in Saros?
faqs.answer: Jerome Jackson is a publicly named Saros ensemble character performed by Ben Prendergast, revealed as part of the expanding colony cast on Carcosa.

faqs.question: Who is Sebastian Torres in Saros?
faqs.answer: Sebastian Torres is another confirmed supporting character in Saros, performed by David DeSantos and tied to the broader Echelon IV crew interactions.

faqs.question: What is The Passage in Saros cast coverage?
faqs.answer: The Passage is Saros' between-run hub where players reconnect with Echelon IV crew members as eclipse pressure escalates and trust inside the group begins to fracture.

faqs.question: Where should I track Saros cast updates?
faqs.answer: Follow Saros cast updates through the official Saros game page, PlayStation Blog story posts, and launch-window trailers featuring character reveals.

lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.title: Saros Returnal Comparison
lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.intro: Saros and Returnal share Housemarque action DNA, but their setup, progression model, combat posture, pacing profile, and story framing differ in ways that matter for first-time players.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Lead and Setup
settings.description: Saros: Arjun Devraj operates on eclipse-struck Carcosa as a Soltari Enforcer. Returnal: Selene crash-lands on Atropos and fights through a repeating survival cycle.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Platform Footprint
settings.description: Saros: Launch messaging is PS5-focused with PS5 Pro enhancement support. Returnal: Available across PS5 family hardware and PC.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Death Progression
settings.description: Saros: Death feeds persistent growth through loadouts, upgrades, and Second Chance recovery. Returnal: Adaptation across repeats remains central with a stronger reset feel per cycle.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Combat Posture
settings.description: Saros: Shield-led aggression emphasizes absorbing blue projectiles, parrying, and converting pressure into burst damage. Returnal: Bullet-hell evasion, alt-fire rhythm, and mobility control remain the core posture.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Run Pacing
settings.description: Saros: Preview coverage points to compact sessions around the half-hour mark. Returnal: Runs generally feel longer and carry harsher reset pressure between complete cycles.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Narrative Framing
settings.description: Saros: Ensemble dynamics in The Passage and across Carcosa are front-loaded. Returnal: The narrative angle stays more solitary and introspective around Selene's loop.

lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.title: Saros Multiplayer and Co-Op
lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.intro: Saros multiplayer and co-op questions are frequent, so this module keeps the official launch scope explicit: single-player focus, no published co-op mode, and clear platform feature labeling.

entries.title: Is Saros multiplayer?
entries.description: No. Official Saros FAQ messaging describes Saros as a single-player action game.

entries.title: Does Saros have co-op?
entries.description: No co-op mode is listed in current Saros launch information. Public product summaries present Saros as an offline single-player title.

entries.title: Does Saros support online multiplayer or cross-play?
entries.description: Current Saros feature listings do not show online multiplayer or cross-play support. Remote Play is the primary online-adjacent feature called out.

entries.title: Does Saros support Remote Play?
entries.description: Yes. Saros feature listings identify Remote Play support for compatible PlayStation sessions.

entries.title: Does Saros require PlayStation Plus?
entries.description: Current Saros product details do not list a PlayStation Plus requirement for the core single-player experience.

lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.title: Saros PS5 Pro Features
lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.intro: Saros PS5 and PS5 Pro technical details now specify image quality behavior, frame rate targets, cinematic cadence, audio design, DualSense usage, and loading expectations.

steps.title: Saros Image Clarity Across PS5 and PS5 Pro
steps.description: Saros on PS5 supports 4K presentation on compatible displays, while Saros on PS5 Pro uses updated PSSR to deliver a sharper scene presentation that tracks close to native 4K clarity.

steps.title: Saros Gameplay Frame Rate Targets
steps.description: Saros gameplay is described at 60fps on both PS5 and PS5 Pro, with the PS5 Pro version pairing that target with a higher base render resolution for cleaner motion detail.

steps.title: Saros Story Cinematics at 30fps
steps.description: Saros story cinematics run at 30fps for higher visual quality on PS5, and Saros PS5 Pro applies the same cadence with an even higher peak resolution.

steps.title: Saros Tempest 3D Audio Layer
steps.description: Saros uses Tempest 3D AudioTech on PS5 family systems to position hostiles, ambience, and combat cues around the player with the same spatial design on PS5 Pro.

steps.title: Saros DualSense Combat Feedback
steps.description: Saros maps a half-pull on L2 to alt-fire and a full-pull to the Eclipse-driven Power Weapon, with adaptive triggers and haptics carrying the same combat language on PS5 and PS5 Pro.

steps.title: Saros SSD Loading and Return Flow
steps.description: Saros uses the ultra-high-speed SSD path for fast returns after death and quick transitions, while Saros on PS5 Pro keeps the same loading pipeline alongside sharper rendering.

faq.title: Saros Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to start and follow Saros.

questions.question: When is the Saros release date?
questions.answer: Saros is scheduled for full release on April 30, 2026, with earlier access tied to the Digital Deluxe package.

questions.question: Where can I play Saros at launch?
questions.answer: Saros launch platform messaging is centered on PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 5 Pro.

questions.question: What makes Saros combat different?
questions.answer: Saros emphasizes projectile pressure, aggressive movement, and a shield-to-power conversion loop during high-intensity encounters.

questions.question: How does Saros progression work after death?
questions.answer: Saros uses persistent progression systems so repeated runs continue building long-term strength and options.

questions.question: Is Saros a multiplayer or co-op game?
questions.answer: Saros is currently presented as a single-player action experience in official launch communication.

questions.question: What are the main Saros PS5 Pro features?
questions.answer: Saros PS5 Pro messaging highlights enhanced clarity, performance-focused action response, and stronger immersion features.
